items.title: As an undersized guard, Ja'Kobi Gillespie draws inspiration from the MVP of the 2026 NBA Finals.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
As an undersized guard, Ja'Kobi Gillespie draws inspiration from the MVP of the 2026 NBA Finals.

Little did Gillespie know he would soon be drafted by the team Jalen Brunson tormented to lead the Knicks' to the title.

items.title: San Antonio had a lot of strengths defensively, but their quest to never foul meant that they ranked 28th in opponent turnover percentage. They have now used second round picks on Ja'Kobi Gillespie (2.1 steals) and now Maliq Brown (1.8 steals)
items.author: Law Murray 📘

items.title: Spurs use the 42nd overall pick to nab Ja'Kobi Gillespie, a 6-foot-1 First-Team All-SEC choice from Tennessee.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Spurs use the 42nd overall pick to nab Ja'Kobi Gillespie, a 6-foot-1 First-Team All-SEC choice from Tennessee.

The 22-year-old also played at Belmont and Maryland.
